story.text:
# 🚪 Lexon_pvm (the grammar workshop)
**gateway** · shared · knowledge

Dual-agent harness instance #5 — the Runecraft ceremony run over a language instead of a blade. Lexon: a tongue lawyers read as law and machines run as code (two true readings of one text — the Hermaion ⚚ pattern in a grammar). Metric = coverage-debt: 211 at census freeze → 64 after four folds (lexr1 181 · lexr2 152 · lexr3 123 · lexr4 64), every lever validated 8/8 on held-out census terms; the campaign caught its first MIRAGE (a self-certification) AND its first structural kill (K-2, a family honestly impossible on zero-party terms); the constitution itself gate-passed 13/13 (OT-5). Regime is a spec-checker, not the unpublished compiler (honest limit). Head 10dad55.

## Edges out

- *implements* → [[Dual-Agent Harness]]
- *relates_to* → [[V19 — Plonkish Blade (Vulcana)]]
- *relates_to* → [[V59 — Threshold District (Pandia · Hermaion · Faunia)]]
- *relates_to* → [[Promise Theory]]
